What I Create

Four ways to preserve
your family's story

Whether you have years of Ancestry research, a box of old photos, or simply a story you want recorded — there's a path for you.

📖

Family History Book

I take your Ancestry tree, records, and photos and turn them into a professionally written, beautifully designed book. Narrative biographies, timelines, maps, and historical context — all in one readable format.

Best for

People who have done the research and want something meaningful to show for it.

From $199 — scope determines final cost

Inquire About a Book
🌿

Legacy & Memorial Book

A story-driven book centered on one or two family members. You share the details, photos, and memories — I craft the narrative and design a keepsake your family will treasure. No genealogy research required.

Best for

Honoring a parent or grandparent. Memorials, milestone birthdays, reunions.

From $199 — no research needed, starts quickly

Inquire About a Legacy Book
📜

Ancestor Biography

Turn your genealogy research into a beautiful narrative biography. Perfect for honoring deceased ancestors with WWII stories, immigration journeys, or pioneer legacies. No interviews needed.

Best for

Deceased ancestors (WWII veterans, immigrants, pioneers). Preserving their legacy before it's lost.

Essential $300 | Complete $500

Learn More & Order
🔍

Genealogy Research

Don't want to spend hours inside Ancestry records yourself? I research your family history for you — documenting findings, breaking brick walls, and building toward a book you can share.

Best for

People who want answers and a finished product — not a DIY subscription.

From $199/month — ongoing, cancel anytime

Inquire About Research

Also available: Photo Restoration from $10  ·  Family Tree Charts from $75  ·  Legacy Share Packs from $100

The Process

Simple from start
to finished book

1

You reach out

Fill out the form with a few details about what you're hoping to preserve. No need to have everything figured out.

2

We talk through your project

I'll respond personally to understand your goals, what research or materials you have, and recommend the right service.

3

I do the work

Research, writing, design — all handled for you. You'll review drafts and give feedback before anything is finalized.

4

Your family receives something lasting

A digital print-ready PDF, eBook, or printed book — designed to be read, shared, and passed down for generations.

"You've spent years collecting family history. Let me help you turn it into something your family can actually hold."

Start the Conversation
Works with Ancestry, MyHeritage, FamilySearch & GEDCOM files
Works with Family Tree Maker & RootsMagic
Works with photos, handwritten notes, oral histories
Works with DNA results and ethnicity estimates
No login or passwords ever required
Clear quote before any work begins
20+ Years Research

The Person Behind the Work

Liane Menendez

Founder, The Lineage Studio

I grew up hearing stories about my grandfather. I was always drawn to history, photography, writing, and design. So when I started researching my own family, I went deep. Years of records, documents, photos, and discoveries piled up.

But I had no way to share any of it. Especially with the elderly relatives who had lived through the very history I was uncovering. Then my older family members began to pass away, taking their stories with them. That changed everything. I became focused on preserving lives, not just dates and names.

As I had children of my own later in life, that desire grew stronger. I wanted them to know where they came from. I wanted the people who came before us to be real to them, not just names on a chart.

The Lineage Studio exists because every family deserves this. I bring together everything I love. history, design, writing, and photography. Into something your family can hold onto forever.

— Liane
